name: Mainframe Segment Transform Pipeline (Java)
description: Java implementation of the Mainframe Segment Transform Pipeline for heavy loads. Reads CDP BigQuery tables via SQL query and produces fixed-width mainframe segment files in GCS.

parameters.name: templatePath
parameters.label: Template Path
parameters.helpText: Local path (or GCS path if implemented) to the segment template YAML file.

parameters.name: periodStart
parameters.label: Period Start
parameters.helpText: Period start date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: periodEnd
parameters.label: Period End
parameters.helpText: Period end date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: outputBucket
parameters.label: Output GCS bucket
parameters.helpText: GCS bucket name for fixed-width segment output files.

parameters.name: runId
parameters.label: Pipeline run ID
parameters.helpText: Unique identifier for this pipeline run.

parameters.name: gcpProjectId
parameters.label: GCP Project ID
parameters.helpText: GCP project ID for BigQuery source tables.
